Phase-8.NAME: Anti-sharing detection and admin enforcement
Phase-8.goal: Detect suspicious device reuse and provide admin enforcement controls.
Phase-8.step-1: M-023: Add handshake observation and endpoint change detection.
Phase-8.step-2: M-023/M-025: Implement suspicion scoring with detect-first enforcement strategy.
Phase-8.step-3: M-024/M-025: Add admin block/unblock/revoke/rotate controls with audit logging.
